svg.title: Agenter cli-shell v9 one-line status toolbar
svg.desc: Collapsed shell-first state. Bottom row is status icon, current streaming part, managed toggle, and Chat entry only. Generated from paired TXT grid; terminal cells are 120 columns by 40 rows.
